_comment: Hoenn (RSE) Overheard lines. Best-effort gen-3 flavor; verified:false until QA'd (CURATION_TODO.md). `who` = real in-game class/name; sprite references Spr_RS_* trainer classes (build-content nulls any that didn't scrape).

littleroot-town.text: This town is so small there's not even one road out of it… you have to cut through the tall grass!

oldale-town.text: See how the two shops have different-colored roofs? That's how you tell a Mart from a Center!

petalburg-city.text: The Gym Leader here is my papa. He won't battle me until I've proven myself…

rustboro-city.text: This is Hoenn's biggest city! The Devon company and the Trainers' School are both here.

dewford-town.text: Trends are everything on this island! Have you heard the latest? It's SO now.

slateport-city.text: The market by the beach sells everything! And the Oceanic Museum's just up the way.

mauville-city.text: Right in the middle of Hoenn! The Bike Shop owner will even give you a free bike.

verdanturf-town.text: The air here is so clean it's famous for it! Perfect for folks who need to rest.

fallarbor-town.text: Ash keeps falling from Mt. Chimney… but the soil grows the best Berries because of it.

lavaridge-town.text: Soak in the hot springs a while! The sand bath'll do your Pokémon good, too.

fortree-city.text: Every house here is built up in the treetops! Careful crossing the bridges.

lilycove-city.text: The Department Store here is the biggest in Hoenn. And the Contest Hall's next door!

mossdeep-city.text: The Space Center launches real rockets! Our Gym Leaders are twins, you know.

sootopolis-city.text: This whole town sits inside a crater! You can only reach it by diving or flying.

pacifidlog-town.text: Our town floats on rafts lashed together! When the tide's right, the currents change.

ever-grande-city.text: All that stands between you and the League now is Victory Road. Good luck, Trainer.

petalburg-woods.text: Watch out for that shady man in the woods — he's from some team or another.

granite-cave.text: There are wall paintings deep inside! The old man in the entrance can tell you about them.

meteor-falls.text: A meteorite fell here ages ago. The falls run deep — deep enough for a Waterfall.

mt-chimney.text: The cable car takes you right to the crater's rim. Feel that heat!

jagged-pass.text: Mind the slope — it's all loose ash and switchbacks down to Lavaridge.

fiery-path.text: This tunnel cuts straight through the mountain's fire. Watch where you step!

rusturf-tunnel.text: They stopped digging this tunnel so the Whismur wouldn't be disturbed. Shh!

mt-pyre.text: The departed rest at the summit. Two orbs were once kept here — red and blue.

shoal-cave.text: The cave floods and empties with the tide! Come back at low tide for the shells.

seafloor-cavern.text: Deep under the sea… this is where they woke the slumbering titan.

team-aqua-hideout.text: For a world covered by the sea! That's Team Aqua's dream, land-dweller!

weather-institute.text: We study Hoenn's rain here — some of the heaviest in the world falls just outside.

abandoned-ship.text: This wreck ran aground years ago. Divers say there's still treasure in the flooded rooms.

sky-pillar.text: The tower where the sky dragon sleeps. Only the Mach Bike can cross that crumbling floor.

hoenn-victory-road.text: The final cave before the League. Every Trainer here has all eight badges — like you.

desert-underpass.text: A passage under the desert… fossils of Pokémon long gone are buried down here.

hoenn-route-101.text: This is where the Professor got attacked by a wild Pokémon! You should grab a partner.

hoenn-route-102.text: The grass here is full of Berries to pick and little Pokémon to catch!

hoenn-route-103.text: Cross the water and you can battle your rival by the shore.

hoenn-route-104.text: The beach on one end, the flower shop on the other, and a forest between!

hoenn-route-105.text: Watch the tides out here — the little islands go under when the water rises.

hoenn-route-106.text: Granite Cave's just up the beach. The Gym Leader trains in there sometimes.

hoenn-route-107.text: Nothing but open sea between the islands here. Great fishing if you Surf out.

hoenn-route-108.text: There's a rusted old ship anchored out here. Divers love poking around it.

hoenn-route-109.text: Best beach in Hoenn! Watch the little kids building sandcastles.

hoenn-route-110.text: Cycling Road runs right over this route — and the trick house is hidden nearby!

hoenn-route-111.text: The sandstorm never quits in the desert stretch. You'll need special goggles to enter.

hoenn-route-112.text: The cable car station is right here — it hauls you up to Mt. Chimney's peak.

hoenn-route-113.text: It's not snow — it's volcanic ash! Collect it and the glassworker will make you something.

hoenn-route-114.text: My brother the Fossil Maniac dug his whole house into the hill over there.

hoenn-route-115.text: The wind off the sea is fierce here. Good training weather, if you can stand up in it!

hoenn-route-116.text: This road runs to the tunnel where they're digging — carefully — around the Whismur.

hoenn-route-117.text: The Pokémon Day Care is right here. Leave two and who knows — you might get an Egg!

hoenn-route-118.text: A wide river cuts this route in two. You'll need to Surf, or catch a ride across.

hoenn-route-119.text: It rains without stopping here. The Weather Institute studies it — and a rare Pokémon lives up top.

hoenn-route-120.text: The bridge is long and the rain is thick. Something invisible brushed past me…

hoenn-route-121.text: Team's up to something on Mt. Pyre, just south of here. Gives me the creeps.

hoenn-route-122.text: Mt. Pyre rises right out of the sea here. Best pay your respects before you pass.

hoenn-route-123.text: There's a Berry garden along this route. The old couple will teach you all about growing them.

hoenn-route-124.text: Divers go down all over this bay hunting for the treasure on the seafloor.

hoenn-route-125.text: Shoal Cave's on the island out here. Bring shells to the old man for a prize!

hoenn-route-126.text: The town under the sea is near here — Sootopolis, in its crater. You have to Dive to reach it.

hoenn-route-127.text: Deep water all around. Perfect for Surfing races — and for the big biters lurking below.

hoenn-route-128.text: The sea churns here… I heard the two ancient titans clashed somewhere close by.

hoenn-route-129.text: Whirlpools and deep water. The waves have been strange ever since the weather turned.

hoenn-route-130.text: There's a mirage island out here that only appears some days. My grandpa's chased it for years!

hoenn-route-131.text: The sky-tower rises from an island near here. They say a legendary dragon sleeps at its peak.

hoenn-route-132.text: The currents shove you around out here — you can only go the way the water lets you.

hoenn-route-133.text: Almost to the far island! The current finally works with you on this stretch.

hoenn-route-134.text: Last leg of the crossing. Ride the strong current straight west and don't fight it!

hoenn-safari-zone.text: No regular Poké Balls in here! Use the Safari Balls and don't scare them off.

island-cave.text: The braille on the wall speaks of a titan of ice sealed away long ago.

desert-ruins.text: Something slumbers behind these sandstone walls — a titan of rock, the legend says.

ancient-tomb.text: An old tomb in the trees. The braille inside speaks of a titan of steel.

sealed-chamber.text: You have to Dive to even find this place. The walls are covered in braille…

scorched-slab.text: A small cave behind the waterfall. The rock inside is scorched black.

new-mauville.text: A generator underground went haywire — the whole facility hums with loose Voltorb!

trick-house.text: Welcome to my Trick House! Solve my puzzle — if you can find me first. Heheh!

mirage-island.text: Some days the island is just… there, shimmering over the water. Then it's gone.

hoenn-battle-frontier.text: Seven facilities, seven Frontier Brains. This island is the ultimate test!
